description: External agent frameworks could become hidden host architecture.
mitigation: OSS introduced now NONE; every future dependency needs Owner approval, tracker, receipt, and rollback.

description: Agent runs can modify tracked runtime outputs and dirty Git.
mitigation: Use RUNS/RUNTIME ignored layer; architecture files separate from generated outputs.

description: Uncontrolled multi-agent discussion can create noise and cascading hallucination.
mitigation: Use typed route cards, checkpoints, organ contracts, and output schemas.

description: A beautiful CLI can hide missing evidence or failed checks.
mitigation: No green status without receipt/check; visual output is presentation only.

description: Parallel stateful agents can write conflicting state.
mitigation: Single-writer by default; concurrency admission required.

description: Route trajectories and logs can become huge.
mitigation: Output budget, JSONL traces, compact summaries, retention policy.
